{{Quote|My troops had orders to take it to a secret base near the Fantain Mountains.|Maximilian Veers, referring to the prototype All-Terrain Armored Transport|audio=FantainMountains.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''Fantain Mountains''' were a location on the sandy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]]. Due to the presence of boulders that blocked the planet's high winds, the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] were home to small forms of animal life, along with [[Zalorian rock-lion]]s. Prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="GB" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> the reigning government known as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a secret base called [[Camp Culroon]] near the Fantain Mountains as part of the development of the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]]—also known as the AT-AT—which was led by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]].<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Fantain Moutains were first mentioned in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', in the game's databank entry for Zaloriis and in the fourth level of the Imperial campaign, titled "An Empire's Fury."<ref name="GB" />
